allies.rationale_text: Experimentation gives variation-and-selection the real-world testing discipline needed to separate promising variants from weak ones.
allies.source_quote: Treating solutions as a portfolio of experiments allows real-world data to steer the subsequent direction.

allies.rationale_text: Base-rates keep variation-and-selection from choosing attractive variants that collapse once the selection step is checked against reference-class reality.
allies.source_quote: The Outside View provides the objective standard necessary for the Selection phase.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Variation-and-selection conflicts with status-quo-bias when exploration of new options is blocked by attachment to the current solution.
structured_tensions.source_quote: variation-and-selection vs status-quo-bias: variation-and-selection conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when variation and Selection challenges the Status Quo Bias by encouraging exploration of new options rather than sticking to existing solutions.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Variation-and-selection conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias when early commitments stop the team from generating or fairly selecting better alternatives.
structured_tensions.source_quote: variation-and-selection vs commitment-and-consistency-bias: variation-and-selection conflicts with commitment-and-consistency-bias (commitment and consistency bias) when commitment and Consistency Bias can hinder the Variation phase by discouraging deviation from initial choices, opposing the model's emphasis on exploring diverse options.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Variation-and-selection conflicts with confirmation-bias when the search space is narrowed to options that merely confirm the current belief.
structured_tensions.source_quote: variation-and-selection vs confirmation-bias: variation-and-selection conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when variation search is constrained to options that confirm existing beliefs, preventing the model from discovering superior alternatives.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved the clearest experimentation and reference-class ally plus the explicit anti-status-quo / anti-confirmation tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader MECE and pedagogy sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: MECE and outside-view are source-real nearby, but the current first-order surface is cleanest around experimentation and a base-rates-safe reference-class seam.
